svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Trang-1" id="UhhQfYUSicVCfJJJY5d5"> <mxGraphModel dx="985" dy="535" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml
header Dự án My Silly Bestie - Tài liệu SRS
title Standard Use Case Diagram (IEEE-Standard)

' Thiết kế phong cách (Skinparam) để màu sắc dịu mắt
skinparam backgroundcolor #FFFFFF
skinparam usecase {
 BackgroundColor #FEFECE
 BorderColor #A80036
 ArrowColor #333333
}

skinparam actor {
 BackgroundColor #E1F5FE
 BorderColor #01579B
}

left to right direction

actor \"Player\n(Người chơi)\" as User #FFF2CC
actor \"System\n(Hệ thống)\" as Sys #E8F5E9

rectangle \"MY SILLY BESTIE - System Boundary\" #F8F9FA {
 
 package \"1.0 Setup Phase (Người 1)\" #F9F9F9 {
 usecase \"<b>1.1. UC1</b>\nSelect Bestie\n(Chọn thú cưng)\" as UC1
 usecase \"<b>1.2. UC2</b>\nSelect Tool\n(Chọn dụng cụ)\" as UC2
 }
 
 package \"2.0 Interaction Core (Người 2 & 3)\" #F0F7FF {
 usecase \"<b>2.1. UC3</b>\nPerform Care\n(Chăm sóc)\" as UC3 #E3F2FD
 usecase \"<b>2.2. UC4</b>\nPerform Prank\n(Trêu chọc)\" as UC4 #FFF3E0
 }
 
 package \"3.0 System Control (Người 4)\" #F1F8E9 {
 usecase \"<b>3.1. UC5</b>\nExecute Penalty\n(Xử lý hình phạt)\" as UC5 #FFEBEE
 usecase \"<b>3.2. UC6</b>\nFinalize Session\n(Kết thúc lượt)\" as UC6 #E8F5E9
 }
}

' Kết nối các Actors
User -- UC1
User -- UC2
User -- UC3
User -- UC4

' Quan hệ Include và Extend
UC4 <.. UC5 : <<extend>>\n(Suspicion > Threshold)
UC3 ..> UC6 : <<include>>
UC5 ..> UC6 : <<include>>

UC6 -- Sys

note bottom of UC5
 Kích hoạt khi thanh nghi ngờ
 đạt ngưỡng tối đa.
end note

@enduml",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="BBhKRwyfuWCPnRECbakh-2"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="622" width="1301" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
